commit.message:
Fix dark mode and hero article ordering

- Add @custom-variant dark to globals.css so Tailwind v4 dark: classes
  respond to the .dark class (set by next-themes) instead of OS media query
- Update all GROQ queries to use coalesce(publishedAt, _createdAt) so
  articles without an explicit publishedAt are still included and ordered
  correctly by most recent

commit.message:
feat: 初始化微信聊天数据分析 MCP Server

实现 11 个 MCP 工具，接入 WeChatMsg 导出的 SQLite 数据库：
- 消息搜索：全文搜索、对话历史、上下文获取、最近对话列表
- 联系人：查询/列出联系人、群聊详情
- 统计分析：全局概览、时间分布、对话深度分析（含情感分析样本）
- 导出：JSON/CSV 格式本地导出

核心亮点：db-manager 实现跨多个 MSG*.db 分片的两阶段分页查询

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Improve README with badges, keywords, and feature highlights for discoverability

commit.message:
Add solar share calculation and improved time periods to energy dashboard

- Solar overview bar showing production, self-consumption, grid export, share %
- Cost calculation split by solar/grid tariff per apartment
- Consumption chart with stacked solar/grid bars
- Time periods: Week, Month, Quarter, Year for consumption chart
- Production meter shows "Produktion heute" with export kWh
- Hauptzähler shows green when exporting to grid
- Negative values = production on all meters

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add quota-aware LLM switching: budget calculator, probability slider, Gemini/Groq support

- Add GET /api/llm/quota endpoint exposing per-provider daily quota (Gemini 1500 RPD, Groq 14400 RPD)
- Add personality/home/work fields to agent detail API for NN training data collection
- Fix nn_selfimprove: /api/agents returns dict not list, correct probability endpoint path
- Fix Gemini scheduled reset to 10:00 AM Athens instead of midnight
- Add 'budget' CLI mode to calculate and apply optimal probability for target duration
- Scheduled mode now auto-calculates probability from remaining quota
- Frontend: rate-limited providers (Gemini/Groq) show quota badge and expand a panel
  with runtime estimates table, probability slider, and confirm button before switching

commit.message:
Fix FAQ page: restore 2-column layout and compact question sizing

- Fix grid layout bug: lg:grid-cols-[220px,1fr] → [220px_1fr]
  (comma in Tailwind arbitrary values is invalid; underscore = space in CSS)
  This was causing the sidebar to stack above the accordion instead of
  sitting side-by-side with it
- Sidebar tabs: add rounded-md px-3 py-1.5 padding + hover:bg-[#f7f9ff]
  highlight for slightly more visual distinction as navigation
- FAQ questions: py-5 → py-4, text-base → text-sm (more compact)
- +/− icon: text-2xl → text-lg (proportionally smaller)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add help to all layer entry rules to destroy previous GUI

Entering any layer now closes all previous layer indicators first,
preventing GUI stacking when switching between layers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix React hydration errors (toLocaleString server/client mismatch)

Use mounted state to defer locale-dependent rendering to client only.
Prevents SSR/CSR output mismatch for dates and recharts.

state(CCC): advance to JOURNEY-24 (Retailer Store Configuration), bump v202 (#522)

STATE_ONLY sync: JOURNEY-23 PARK-READY confirmed (4th retailer-web journey).
Switch activeJourney to JOURNEY-24, auditMode to USER_ACTION_ENUMERATION.
Coverage: RETAILER_WEB parkReady 3→4, certPending 12→11.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix CPU freq locking: use tee instead of > redirect for sysfs writes

su -c "echo X > /path" fails because > is not interpreted as shell
redirect by Magisk/KernelSU su. Using tee ensures the write actually
reaches the sysfs file. Added verification logs to confirm writes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [QA #360]: 메뉴관리 리스트·툴바 한 줄 배치

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [QA #360]: 메뉴관리 검색 조건 UI 개선 및 Enter 키 검색 지원

- 기본 조회 건수 10건으로 변경
- 검색 입력창 폭 고정(flex-fixed) 및 한 행 배치
- 검색 입력창 Enter 키 입력 시 조회 실행

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [QA #360]: 메뉴관리 스크립트 개선

- 기본 조회 건수 itemsPerPage 20 → 10
- alert() 전면 Toast 알림 전환 (error/success)
- 디버그 console.log·console.error 제거
- 데이터 행에 cursor-pointer 클래스 추가
- PK(menuId) 수정 불가 처리: readonly → disabled
- 수정 모달 오픈 시 _editMenuId에 원본 ID 저장 후 save()에서 활용

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [QA #360]: 메뉴관리 R권한 사용자 등록·저장·삭제 버튼 숨김

- 등록 버튼: th:if MENU:W 권한 보유 시에만 표시
- 저장·삭제 버튼: th:if MENU:W 권한 보유 시에만 표시

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [QA #360]: @Valid 검증 실패 시 첫 번째 필드 오류 메시지 반환

기존에는 고정 메시지("입력값 검증 실패")를 반환했으나
FieldError의 defaultMessage를 추출해 클라이언트에 전달하도록 변경

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [QA #360]: 메뉴관리 E2E 테스트 코드 추가

- e2e/helpers/menu.ts: 테스트 공유 헬퍼 (생성/삭제/ID생성)
- e2e/api/menus.spec.ts: API 계약 테스트 (조회/등록/수정/삭제/엑셀/인증)
- e2e/pages/menu-manage/menu-manage.spec.ts: 페이지 E2E 테스트 (목록·검색·정렬·CRUD·권한)
- e2e/pages/menu-manage/menu-readonly.spec.ts: R권한 사용자 접근 제어 테스트
- e2e/fixtures/locale.ts: 메뉴관리 모달 타이틀 레이블 추가

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [QA #360]: 테스트 헬퍼 인라인화 — 공유 helpers/menu.ts 제거

각 테스트 파일이 외부 헬퍼에 의존하지 않도록
fetchFirstMenuId·createMenu·deleteMenu·generateMenuId·generateMenuName 함수를
menus.spec.ts·menu-manage.spec.ts에 각각 인라인하고 helpers/menu.ts 삭제

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [QA #360]: 테스트 격리 강화 — beforeAll skip 전파 차단 및 cleanup 보완

- beforeAll에서 test.skip(true) 제거: parentMenuId 없어도 무관한 테스트(조회·404·인증 등)가 스킵되지 않도록 수정
- parentMenuId 의존 테스트만 개별 if (!parentMenuId) test.skip() 처리
- 삭제 테스트에 try/finally 추가: UI/API 삭제 실패 시 잔여 데이터가 다른 테스트에 영향을 주지 않도록 보완

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [QA #360]: 검색 버튼 id 추가 및 테스트 로케이터 수정

테이블 각 행의 "하위메뉴 조회" 버튼과 충돌하여
getByRole('button', { name: '조회' })가 11개 요소에 매칭되는 문제 수정
- 검색 버튼에 id="btnSearch" 추가
- 테스트 로케이터를 page.locator('#btnSearch')으로 변경

commit.message:
fix: add linear retries to PollRunStatusJob for transient failures

Add 3 retries with linear backoff (~10s, ~15s, ~20s) to handle
transient 500s from external CI providers (e.g. Octokit). Linear
backoff keeps retries quick since this is a polling job that
re-enqueues every 2 minutes — exponential would show stale status.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 修复 MHI 等合约 Tick 订阅静默失败问题

根本原因（推测）：
  程序重启后，IB 侧仍保留同一 clientId 的旧 Tick 订阅（不会自动清除）。
  新一轮 reqTickByTickData 被 IB 以错误码 321 拒绝，但该错误被静默丢弃，
  导致 ticker.updateEvent 永不触发，合约数据静止不更新。

修复：
  1. ib_client.subscribe_ticks()：订阅前先发 cancelTickByTickData
     清除 IB 侧可能残留的旧订阅，避免 321 错误。
  2. engine._on_ib_error()：完整记录所有 IB 错误（warning 级别），
     信息级状态通知（2104/2106 等）降级为 debug，方便排查订阅失败等问题。
  3. engine._on_ib_error()：捕获 321 错误，对对应合约触发
     _resubscribe_one()（延迟 1 秒后 cancel + re-subscribe）自动恢复。
  4. 新增 _resubscribe_one(key)：单合约 Tick 重订阅，
     用于 321 错误恢复，不影响其他合约。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix unit scaling: power in mW, current in mA (verified against meters)

Tested raw register values from smart-me Telstar 80A:
- Power registers return milliwatts (mW), divide by 1000 for W
- Current registers return milliamps (mA), divide by 1000 for A
- Voltage registers return millivolts (mV), divide by 1000 for V
- Energy kWh registers return value * 1000

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add receipt image capture for matchday expenses (#236)

* Add receipt image capture for matchday expenses

Store receipt photos in Netlify Blobs with local filesystem fallback for
development. Officials can capture photos from camera or upload files when
adding expenses. Treasurers can view receipts in the detailed expense view.

- Add receipt_image_url column to matchday_expense table
- Create blob storage abstraction (Netlify Blobs + local fallback)
- Add shared image compression utility (1200px max, 400KB)
- Add /api/receipt/[key] endpoint to serve stored images
- Update expense form with image capture input and preview
- Add receipt viewing lightbox in both official and treasurer views
- Add detailed expense list view in treasurer dashboard

Closes #235

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Address code review feedback

- Add authentication to receipt image API endpoint
- Replace type assertions with zod validation in blob storage
- Fix type assertion in image compression utility
- Store full URL path in receipt_image_url instead of raw key
- Add null coalescing guard for receipt URL in treasurer view
- Change Cache-Control to private for authenticated endpoint

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix TypeScript type errors in blob storage

Use Uint8Array and ArrayBuffer instead of Node Buffer for compatibility
with strict TypeScript checks and web API types (BlobInput, BodyInit).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix blob storage on deploy previews — fall back to data URL in DB

Netlify Blobs requires NETLIFY_BLOBS_CONTEXT which isn't available on
all Netlify environments (e.g. deploy previews via Astro adapter).
When blob context is unavailable, store the data URL directly in the
receipt_image_url column as a fallback. In production with blobs
configured, images are stored in the blob store and served via the
/api/receipt/[key] endpoint.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Remove handlebars template system — conductor passes a plain prompt string
  that tells the agent to read performer.md/reviewer.md itself
- Simplify performer.md/reviewer.md to be self-contained instructions
  the spawned agent reads, not templates the conductor fills
- Fix terminal detection to use $TERM_PROGRAM for iTerm2/Ghostty/Terminal.app

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add static HTML pages per scenario for web_fetch compatibility

Generates /scenario-A.html through /scenario-D.html at build time
with all content, colors, and palette inline (no JS required).
Enables Claude AI and link preview tools to read full scenario content.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix layer_44 indicator on cmd release; capslock=escape unless in layer

- Remove help from layer_44 entry to_after_key_up (was closing sublayer indicators on cmd release)
- Change eecaps to send escape + close GUIs instead of entering capslock_layer
- Capslock in any layer now exits the layer; in no layer sends escape

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
